# Artifact Scope Note

Template status: product-neutral copy source
Owner: product workspace

Do not place raw private/customer data, secrets, credentials, private keys, or
unredacted confidential payloads in this template.

## Artifact

- Product:
- Run/report id:
- Artifact contract version:
- Report artifact refs:
- Source/input manifest refs:
- Policy/config hash:
- Code version/ref:

## Real Input Scope

- Allowed inputs:
- Excluded inputs:
- Private/customer data handling:
- Public-source capture handling:
- Redaction or fingerprint method:

## Allowed Claims

- Internal demo claims:
- Controlled external pilot claims:
- Explicitly blocked claims:
